name: ViveRE Communities Inc.
summary: ViveRE Communities Inc. owns and manages multi-unit residential real estate properties in Canada. As of December 23, 2020, it owned and managed 533 units in New Brunswick and Ontario. The company was formerly known as NSX Silver Inc. and changed its name to ViveRE Communities Inc. in August 2018. ViveRE Communities Inc. was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Halifax, Canada.
